# CODAP

Siin on CODAP harjutus.

## Interaktiivne sisu

<iframe width="100%" height="400px" frameborder="no" scrolling="no" allowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" src="https://codap.concord.org/app/static/dg/en/cert/index.html#shared=https%3A%2F%2Fcfm-shared.concord.org%2FMeGPbzSyENmoFU8v0Puz%2Ffile.json"></iframe>
